summary: Comprehensive testing of cognitive exercise workbook app for Alzheimer patients completed successfully
passed_tests: Backend API /api/exercise-types returns all 10 exercise types in Italian
Backend API /api/generate/chapter creates chapters with exercises
Backend API /api/books CRUD operations working correctly
All 7 required exercise types (sequence, math, match, odd_one_out, copy, recognition, memory) supported
Dashboard loads with 'Quaderni Cognitivi' branding in Italian
Create new book dialog shows all settings (difficulty, color mode, font size)
Add chapter dialog displays exercise types correctly
Chapter generation with sequence exercises working
Exercise content displays correctly with Italian instructions
